title: Alaska SBDC Awarded SBA Business Champion Award for NSBW

title: Alaska Day 2024 Recap
summary: The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) recently held its 8th Annual Alaska Day in Washington, D.C. on May 1 and 2. The theme of the event was “Building Blocks for a Sustainable Future,” with a focus on topics such as energy and infrastructure, government services, food security, hunting and fishing,...

title: Petersburg residents assemble “biggest puzzle in the world” over the winter
summary: Petersburg residents assembled about 60 sections of a 60,000 piece puzzle in the community gym on May 5, 2024. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) In the cold, dark days of winter, some Alaskans turn to jigsaw puzzles to keep themselves busy indoors. This year, one Petersburg resident took that idea to the extreme – ordering the biggest puzzle in the world, and rallying hundreds of community members to put it together. But participants say the puzzle was more than just a puzzle. It was about finding...

title: SSBCI May 2024 Update
summary: This month, Alaska SSBCI helped secure nearly $48.3 million in loans across 25 communities, supporting 66 businesses . Encouragingly, 57 businesses identified as socially and economically disadvantaged (SEDI) and 46 were very small businesses (VSB) with less than ten employees. The program is reachi...

title: U.S. Forest Service considers higher fees for new Alaska cabins
summary: Petersburg resident, Brian Richards, stands outside of West Point Cabin located on the north side of Kupreanof Island on May 4, 2024. (Photo by Ola Richards) The U.S. Forest Service is planning to build a few dozen new cabins on the Tongass and Chugach National Forests in the coming years. The agency is proposing higher fees – $75 a night – to help keep up with the increased cost of maintenance. Listen to the story: Life-long Petersbur...

title: April 2024 Meeting – Anchorage
summary: The Council met April 1-9 at the Hilton Hotel in Anchorage, Alaska. The schedule , eAgenda, and Newsletter are available. You can listen to the recordings via our YouTube channel . Learn More →
